Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Artem, I understand this is a bug in detecting ".bak" files, but it is really a much larger bug that it doesn't detect ".orig" or "~" or ".old" or any other extension. While it is good to say "this can be fixed later", in fact I've asked for this to be fixed several times (see comments in LU-7160 from 20 months ago, and on the original version of the .bak-skipping patch).

In any case, this patch needs to be debased to get the LU-10898 fix.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Removed the following votes:

* Code-Review-1 by HPDD Checkpatch (377)

Patch Set 2:

Artem, can you please refresh this patch, at least using "sizeof()" instead of "4".

Also, it would be great if you can implement the proper whitelist instead of a blacklist, since this code is not very safe as-is.
Uploaded patch set 3.

Looks good to me.

Code-wise looks good to me.

Patch Set 3:

(1 comment)

Hello Andreas! Yes whitelist looks more robust. I created https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11648 to switch this function to whitelist.
This patch fixes current implementation.

commit.subject: LU-10883 llog: fix backup file name comparison
commit.message:
LU-10883 llog: fix backup file name comparison

Last 3 bytes of key are wrongly compared with ".bak" extention.
4 bytes need to be compared.
